name: TUNIC
description: Explore a land filled with lost legends, ancient powers, and ferocious monsters in TUNIC, an isometric action game about a small fox on a big adventure.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Sword Progression
options.description: Adds four sword upgrades to the item pool that will progressively grant stronger melee weapons, including two new swords with increased range and attack power.

options.label: Start With Sword
options.description: Start with a sword in the player's inventory.

options.label: Keys Behind Bosses
options.description: Places the three hexagon keys behind their respective boss fight in your world.

options.label: Ability Shuffling
options.description: Locks the usage of Prayer, Holy Cross*, and the Icebolt combo until the relevant pages of the manual have been found.

options.label: Fool Traps
options.description: Replaces low-to-medium value money rewards in the item pool with fool traps, which cause random negative effects to the player.

options.label: Laurels Location
options.description: Force the Hero's Laurels to be placed at a location in your world.

options.label: Hexagon Quest
options.description: An alternate goal that shuffles Gold "Questagon" items into the item pool and allows the game to be completed after collecting the required number of them.

options.label: Hexagon Goal
options.description: How many Gold Questagons are required to complete the game on Hexagon Quest.

options.label: Extra Hexagon Percentage
options.description: How many extra Gold Questagons are shuffled into the item pool, taken as a percentage of the goal amount.

options.label: Hexagon Quest Ability Type
options.description: Determines how abilities are unlocked when playing Hexagon Quest with Shuffled Abilities enabled.

options.label: Shuffle Ladders
options.description: Turns several ladders in the game into items that must be found before they can be climbed on.

options.label: Shuffle Fuses
options.description: Praying at a fuse will reward a check instead of turning on the power.

options.label: Shuffle Bells
options.description: The East and West bells are shuffled into the item pool and must be found in order to unlock the Sealed Temple.

options.label: Grass Randomizer
options.description: Turns over 6,000 blades of grass and bushes in the game into checks.

options.label: Breakable Shuffle
options.description: Turns approximately 250 breakable objects in the game into checks.

options.label: Local Fill
options.description: Choose the percentage of your filler/trap items that will be kept local or distributed to other TUNIC players with this option enabled.

options.label: Entrance Rando
options.description: Randomize the connections between scenes.

options.label: Entrance Layout
options.description: Decide how the Entrance Randomizer chooses how to pair the entrances.

options.label: Decoupled
options.description: Decouple the entrances, so that when you go from one entrance to another, the return trip won't necessarily bring you back to the same place.

options.label: Combat Logic
options.description: If enabled, the player will logically require a combination of stat upgrade items and equipment to get some checks or navigate to some areas, with a goal of matching the vanilla combat difficulty.

options.label: Lanternless
options.description: When enabled, you may be required to navigate dark areas without the Lantern.

options.label: Maskless
options.description: When enabled, you may be required to traverse Lower Quarry without the Scavenger's Mask.

options.label: Laurels Zips
options.description: Choose whether to include using the Hero's Laurels to zip through gates, doors, and tricky spots.

options.label: Ice Grappling
options.description: Choose whether grappling frozen enemies is in logic.

options.label: Ladder Storage
options.description: Choose whether Ladder Storage is in logic.

options.label: Ladder Storage Without Items
options.description: If disabled, you logically require Stick, Sword, Magic Orb, or Shield to perform Ladder Storage.
